inline_comments.message: if there is no additional code it's ununsed to define own `execute`

There is a concrete reason begind. Use of the decorator o execute()
It must be used by top level execute() (at least I understand itnlike that. Initially i just wanted it only in the CheckK8sResourcesStep. But then CheckK8sNamespace step
Needs own execute and it must inherit from CheckK8sResourcesStep so in
Consequence what decorator does was executed twice for this particular step... so I dropped decorator
In execute of CheckK8sResourcesStep but then I had to add it on other classes
That inherit from CheckK8sResourcesStep. That's why empty execute in few places
But with declared decorator.
